title: bromus pinnatus var. sylvaticus
intro: Bromus pinnatus var. sylvaticus, also known as woodland brome, is a perennial grass species native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce pain and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Bromus pinnatus var. sylvaticus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
